name: The Weekend: Primetime
overview: Ayman Mohyeldin, Antonia Hylton, Catherine Rampell, and Elise Jordan team up to bring their wide range of political expertise to “TheWeekend: Primetime,” every Saturday and Sunday evening. Fresh analysis of the week's biggest events and a rotating crew of major newsmakers.

trailers.title: The Weekend and The Weekend: Primetime | MSNBC
